headline: Amazon unveils new AI warehouse robot in $12 billion Europe push
summary: Amazon on Thursday unveiled an upgraded AI-powered mobile robot for its warehouses that can ‌respond to conversational prompts, as part of a €10 billion ($11.6 billion) investment ‌in its European fulfilment network.  The ⁠new version, due in Europe in the first half of 2027, can operate across warehouse floors and marks a ⁠shift in how employees interact with robots.  Amazon also showcased STARK, ​a robotic tote-handling system first ‌piloted in Barcelona and set to roll out to 15 European sites by 2027, and Vulcan, its first robot with a sense of touch.

content.title: Amazon unveils new AI warehouse robot in $12 billion Europe push
content.summary: Amazon on Thursday unveiled an upgraded AI-powered mobile robot for its warehouses that can ‌respond to conversational prompts, as part of a €10 billion ($11.6 billion) investment ‌in its European fulfilment network.  The ⁠new version, due in Europe in the first half of 2027, can operate across warehouse floors and marks a ⁠shift in how employees interact with robots.  Amazon also showcased STARK, ​a robotic tote-handling system first ‌piloted in Barcelona and set to roll out to 15 European sites by 2027, and Vulcan, its first robot with a sense of touch.

headline: Did Amazon’s Rejected Climate Proposals Quietly Reinforce Its AI and AWS Narrative (AMZN)?
summary: On May 22, 2026, Amazon.com reported the results of its May 20 annual meeting, where multiple shareholder proposals on climate reporting, board leadership, charitable partnerships, and director accountability all failed by wide margins. The decisive rejection of these governance and climate-related resolutions highlights strong shareholder support for Amazon’s current board structure and disclosure approach, even as broader debates about AI, data centers, and sustainability intensify...

headline: Pinterest deepens Amazon partnership with $4 billion cloud deal
summary: Pinterest said on Thursday it would pay Amazon Web Services $4 billion for cloud ‌services through 2031, as the social media ‌company strengthens a long-term partnership with its largest-ever deal.  Shares of Pinterest ​rose nearly 6%, while those of Amazon were up 1.5%.  Amazon.com's cloud computing unit will provide Pinterest its custom chip processors, including Graviton and Trainium, to help scale ‌its AI initiatives.

content.title: Pinterest deepens Amazon partnership with $4 billion cloud deal
content.summary: Pinterest said on Thursday it would pay Amazon Web Services $4 billion for cloud ‌services through 2031, as the social media ‌company strengthens a long-term partnership with its largest-ever deal.  Shares of Pinterest ​rose nearly 6%, while those of Amazon were up 1.5%.  Amazon.com's cloud computing unit will provide Pinterest its custom chip processors, including Graviton and Trainium, to help scale ‌its AI initiatives.

summary: Seller Ledger today announced new multi-currency accounting capabilities designed to solve one of the most persistent bookkeeping challenges facing Amazon sellers: accurately accounting for sales, fees, and payouts across multiple countries and currencies. headline: CloudInteract and Red Kite Launch Joint Delivery Partnership for Agentic AI Voice on Amazon Connect and Pega
summary: LAS VEGAS & LONDON, June 04, 2026--CloudInteract, the Amazon Connect and agentic AI specialist, and Red Kite, the Pega delivery partner, today announced a joint delivery partnership to bring autonomous AI voice agents to enterprises using the Pega and Amazon Connect platforms. The partnership debuts a working solution on Amazon Connect, Amazon Bedrock, that can be seen at PegaWorld® in Las Vegas, 7–9 June 2026.

content.title: CloudInteract and Red Kite Launch Joint Delivery Partnership for Agentic AI Voice on Amazon Connect and Pega
content.summary: LAS VEGAS & LONDON, June 04, 2026--CloudInteract, the Amazon Connect and agentic AI specialist, and Red Kite, the Pega delivery partner, today announced a joint delivery partnership to bring autonomous AI voice agents to enterprises using the Pega and Amazon Connect platforms. The partnership debuts a working solution on Amazon Connect, Amazon Bedrock, that can be seen at PegaWorld® in Las Vegas, 7–9 June 2026.
